# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension · Proof-Carrying Artifact Passport v29

Status: PASS (local deterministic verification)

This increment adds `/proof-carrying-artifact-passport.html`, a browser-local demonstration of the Proof-Carrying Artifact standard: stable artifact identity, version hash, proof history, evaluator attestations, scope authorization, dependency integrity, public/private proof boundary, rollback target, challenge window, and human review.

It preserves the project boundary: no account, no forms, no analytics, no cookies, no localStorage/sessionStorage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token route, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data wanted.

Core teaching line: reusable capability is not copy-paste; it is a proof-carrying artifact with scope, lineage, rollback, and public/private boundaries.
